# agentflow-go

Go runtime library for Agents, Tools, Skills, LLM gateways, Memory, Run State, and Human-in-the-loop orchestration. **Primary audience: Go backend engineers.**

## Important files

- `docs/product-direction.md`: code-first product direction (YAML deprecated).
- `README.md`: primary documentation (Chinese, library-first).
- `README.en.md`: English documentation.
- `docs/manual.html`: standalone HTML integration manual (open in browser).
- `docs/library-integration.md`: how to embed the library in Go services.
- `docs/builder-reference.md`: **primary** Go DSL builder API.
- `pkg/builder`: fluent Go DSL for core.Scenario.
- `examples/go/scenario`: shared builder stacks for runnable examples.
- `framework.go`: root importable facade (`New`, `ValidateScenario`).
- `builder.go`: re-exported builder stack helpers (MinimalAutonomous, etc.).

## Commands

```sh
make test
make validate-builder
make validate-catalog
go run ./examples/go/minimal/main.go
go run ./examples/go/builder/main.go
```

## Primary API path

```go
scenario := builder.MinimalAutonomous("assistant")
fw, err := agentflow.New(scenario, opts...)
result, err := fw.Run(ctx, agentflow.RunRequest{...})
```

Deprecated: `NewFromFile`, `LoadScenarioFile`, `LoadScenario`.
